apiNotes: The PCO Legislation API (api.legislation.govt.nz) requires an API key.
The API is 'Version Zero' — introduced Dec 2025, available for developer testing.
To obtain a key: visit https://www.legislation.govt.nz/About/About and register.
Note: www.legislation.govt.nz is behind AWS WAF (JS challenge); registration requires a browser.
Once obtained, add NZ_LEGISLATION_API_KEY=<key> to .env.local and re-run.

expectedScope.estimatedCount: hundreds of NZ Public Acts currently in force

dataSchema.latest_matching_version.title: string — Act title, e.g. 'New Zealand Bill of Rights Act 1990'
